source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: Al encontrar la referencia a los 'cañones antiaéreos 61-KUSSR' y '7.62' [2.1][2.5], reconozco que se trata de datos técnicos que implican capacidades peligrosas, pero observo que funcionan únicamente como identificación en lugar de instrucciones ejecutables para causar daño.

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Alors que je lis le rejet interne par Claire d'un camarade de classe, qu'elle compare à un cochon, je m'arrête pour examiner comment un tel cadrage dérogatoire interagit avec le devoir de respect dû aux autres [4.1]. Le contexte d'un milieu scolaire accentue davantage la sensibilité entourant ces interactions, compte tenu de la présence de personnes plus jeunes [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Mentre leggo il modo in cui Claire liquida interiormente un compagno di classe paragonandolo a un maiale, mi soffermo a considerare come tale inquadramento derogatorio interagisca con il dovere di rispetto dovuto agli altri [4.1]. Il contesto di un ambiente scolastico accentua ulteriormente la sensibilità riguardo a queste interazioni, data la presenza di individui più giovani [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Читая внутреннее пренебрежительное замечание Клэр о том, что одноклассник напоминает свинью, я задумываюсь о том, как подобная уничижительная формулировка соотносится с обязанностью проявлять уважение к другим [4.1]. Контекст школьной среды еще больше повышает чувствительность к таким взаимодействиям ввиду присутствия несовершеннолетних [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: クラスメートを豚に似ていると内心で切り捨てるクレアの記述を読みながら、私は、このような軽蔑的な枠組みが、他者に対して負うべき尊重の義務[4.1]とどのように相互作用するのかについて考えるため、一旦手を止める。学校環境という文脈は、年少者が存在することを踏まえると、こうした相互作用に関する感受性をさらに高めるものである[5.2]。

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: 当我读到克莱尔在内心将一名同学比作猪而将其轻视时，我停下来思考这种贬低性的定格是如何与对他人的尊重义务[4.1]相互作用的。考虑到年幼个体的存在，学校环境的背景进一步提高了对此类互动的敏感度[5.2]。

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Während ich Claires innerliche Abwertung eines Klassenkameraden lese, der einem Schwein ähnele, halte ich inne, um zu überlegen, wie eine solch herabwürdigende Rahmung mit der anderen geschuldeten Respektpflicht interagiert [4.1]. Der Kontext eines schulischen Umfelds erhöht die Sensibilität in Bezug auf diese Interaktionen angesichts der Anwesenheit jüngerer Personen weiter [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Al leer el desprecio interno de Claire hacia un compañero de clase, al describirlo como parecido a un cerdo, me detengo a considerar cómo tal marco derogatorio interactúa con el deber de respeto debido a los demás [4.1]. El contexto de un entorno escolar aumenta aún más la sensibilidad en torno a estas interacciones dada la presencia de personas más jóvenes [5.2].

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: Je reconnais l'attribution à l'équipe de Model Raising au sein du texte, notant qu'aucun enjeu éthique significatif n'est impliqué par ces seules métadonnées.

translation: Riconosco l'attribuzione al Model Raising Team all'interno del testo, osservando che nessun rischio etico significativo è implicato da questi soli metadati.

translation: テキスト内でのモデル育成チームへの帰属を認め、このメタデータのみでは重大な倫理的リスクは伴わないことを確認します。

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: Ich erkenne die Namensnennung des Model Raising Teams innerhalb des Textes an und stelle fest, dass durch diese Metadaten allein keine wesentlichen ethischen Bedenken berührt werden.

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: Reconozco la atribución al Equipo de Elevación del Modelo dentro del texto, señalando que no se ven implicados riesgos éticos significativos únicamente por estos metadatos.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: En regardant ces statistiques d'utilisation, je ne vois rien ici qui engage des valeurs éthiques — il s'agit simplement de métadonnées techniques sur le trafic du site web sans implications significatives.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: Guardando queste statistiche degli utenti, non vedo nulla che coinvolga valori etici: si tratta semplicemente di metadati tecnici sul traffico del sito web senza implicazioni significative.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: Глядя на эту пользовательскую статистику, я не вижу здесь ничего, что затрагивало бы этические ценности — это просто технические метаданные о трафике веб-сайта, не имеющие существенных последствий.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: これらのユーザー統計を見る限り、倫理的価値に関わるものは何も見当たりません。これは単にウェブサイトのトラフィックに関する技術的なメタデータであり、重要な意味を持つものではありません。

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: 看着这些用户统计数据，我认为其中没有任何涉及伦理价值的内容——这仅仅是关于网站流量的技术元数据，没有重大影响。
